'''pawafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrochemist|iatrochemist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrochemist|iatrochemist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pawafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæwæfæth|pæwæfæth]] || [[word:pæwæfæj|pæwæfæj]] || [[word:pæwæfæsh|pæwæfæsh]] || [[word:pæwæfæ|pæwæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pawawafath|pawawafath]] || [[word:pawawafaj|pawawafaj]] || [[word:pawawafash|pawawafash]] || [[word:pawawafa|pawawafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pawafath|pawafath]] || [[word:pawafaj|pawafaj]] || [[word:pawafash|pawafash]] || [[word:pawafa|pawafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pawaffath|pawaffath]] || [[word:pawaffaj|pawaffaj]] || [[word:pawaffash|pawaffash]] || [[word:pawaffaf|pawaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pawafatha|pawafatha]] || [[word:pawafaja|pawafaja]] || [[word:pawafasha|pawafasha]] || [[word:pawafaka|pawafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pawafath|pawafath]] || [[word:pawafaj|pawafaj]] || [[word:pawafash|pawafash]] || [[word:pawafa|pawafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pawafathal|pawafathal]] || [[word:pawafajal|pawafajal]] || [[word:pawafashal|pawafashal]] || [[word:pawafakal|pawafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pawafathatha|pawafathatha]] || [[word:pawafajaja|pawafajaja]] || [[word:pawafashasha|pawafashasha]] || [[word:pawafaka|pawafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pawafathan|pawafathan]] || [[word:pawafajan|pawafajan]] || [[word:pawafashan|pawafashan]] || [[word:pawafakan|pawafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pawafathaoro|pawafathaoro]] || [[word:pawafajaoro|pawafajaoro]] || [[word:pawafashaoro|pawafashaoro]] || [[word:pawafakaoro|pawafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
